# terrible_cisco_mso_mso_remote_location (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `authentication_type` (String) The authentication method used to connect to the remote server.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `description` (String) The remote location's description.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `remote_host` (String) The host name or IP address of the remote server.
- `remote_location` (String) The remote location's name.
- `remote_password` (String) The password used to log in to the remote server.
- `remote_path` (String) The full path to a directory on the remote server where backups are saved. The path must start with a slash (/) character and must not contain periods (.) or backslashes (\). The directory must already exist on the server.
- `remote_port` (Number) The port used to connect to the remote server.
- `remote_protocol` (String) The protocol used to export to the remote server. If the remote location is a Windows server, you must use the `sftp` protocol.
- `remote_ssh_key` (String) The private ssh key used to log in to the remote server. The private ssh key must be provided in PEM format. The private ssh key must be a single line string with linebreaks represent as "\n".
- `remote_ssh_passphrase` (String) The private ssh key passphrase used to log in to the remote server.
- `remote_username` (String) The username used to log in to the remote server.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Use `present` or `absent` for adding or removing. Use `query` for listing an object or multiple objects.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
